source: Inferred from WCEPS Pathways and linked WCEPS program sites; replace with official brand kits when available.
basis: Homepage, products/services pages, linked CARE Coaching, WebbAlign, and CALL pages.

colorTokens.name: navy
colorTokens.usage: Primary headings, high-contrast panels, footer areas

colorTokens.name: blue
colorTokens.usage: Primary actions and WCEPS service accents

colorTokens.name: teal
colorTokens.usage: Secondary actions, highlight bands, visual prompts

colorTokens.name: green
colorTokens.usage: Growth, improvement, and continuous learning accents

colorTokens.name: offWhite
colorTokens.usage: Warm page background and print-friendly surfaces

notes: Visual style is inferred, not an official brand kit.
Keep important text in HTML/CSS instead of model-rendered image text.
Prefer calm educational imagery with readable whitespace for overlays.
